steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word Then shows that the dig proceeds in a set order: first a grid is made, then the site is dug and artifacts are recorded.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The transition Finally correctly signals the last step in that sequence — removing, cataloging, and analyzing the artifacts.

The other three choices either give an example, express contrast, or reverse the order, none of which fit the chronological flow.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
